name: Multiple jobs with noise, how fault split for hearing loss claim?
description: Current employer pays, apportion via experts.[3]

mainEntity.name: Multiple jobs with noise, how fault split for hearing loss claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Current employer pays, apportion via experts.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Apportion based on exposure contribution via medical opinion; current employer liable for full if last injurious.[2][3] Key factors: Expert allocates % per job, prior may offset.[3] File against last employer, seek prior records.[1] Lawyer handles multi-party.[5]
